name: Jacobs Solutions Inc.
description: Jacobs Solutions Inc. is a global professional services company that provides a full spectrum of services including consulting, technical, scientific, and project delivery for the government and private sector. The company focuses on solving the world's most critical problems across various sectors such as water, transportation, healthcare, and technology. Jacobs delivers innovative solutions for infrastructure, advanced manufacturing, and environmental sustainability, leveraging its deep engineering expertise to support complex projects from concept through operations and maintenance.
